content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To     :     File                                                                  Date     :     May 6, 1978


From     :     FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
               Gina S-K

Subject:     Agenda item at opinion request meeting of March 31, 1978


A media business which produces campaign material for sale
to the public for the sole purpose of making money without
an intent to influence the action of voters is not a
committee and has no reporting obligation as a result of
the sale of the material.

sections.conclusion: A media business which produces campaign material for sale to the public for the sole purpose of making money without an intent to influence the action of voters is not a committee and has no reporting obligation as a result of the sale of the material.
sections.question_synthetic: Whether a media business that produces and sells campaign materials solely for profit, without intent to influence voters, qualifies as a committee with reporting obligations under California political practices law.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC concluded that a media business producing campaign materials for profit without voter influence intent does not constitute a committee and has no reporting obligations.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a memo rather than formal advice letter format. No formal QUESTION section header present, but the subject line and content clearly indicate this is FPPC's response to an opinion request. The verbatim conclusion text is provided in the subject matter discussion.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether a media business that produces and sells campaign materials solely for profit, without intent to influence voters, qualifies as a committee with reporting obligations under California political practices law.

CONCLUSION: A media business which produces campaign material for sale to the public for the sole purpose of making money without an intent to influence the action of voters is not a committee and has no reporting obligation as a result of the sale of the material.

embedding.summary: FPPC memorandum responding to a March 31, 1978 opinion request meeting agenda item regarding whether a media business selling campaign materials for profit constitutes a reportable committee under political practices law.
